summary: Anchor to superseded RMiT version — draft anchors to the 1 June 2023 RMiT while the 28 Nov 2025 version supersedes it
label: conflicts-with

source_clauses.text: This Policy Document shall be read together with the Risk Management in Technology (RMiT) policy document issued on 1 June 2023.

target_clauses.text: This policy document supersedes the Risk Management in Technology policy document issued on 1 June 2023.
